args.note: date-fns functions: each in own directory with index.ts. Pattern: import toDate, check day, return boolean.

args.summary: Read function patterns. Each function in its own dir. Will create src/isWeekday/index.ts.

args.final_answer: Added `isWeekday(date)` to `src/isWeekday/index.ts`. Returns `true` for Monday through Friday (getDay() 1-5). Follows date-fns function conventions with JSDoc and type support.
